summary: Mining/Daily Rewards claim flow bug fix verified. Both backend API tests (13/13 passed) and frontend UI tests confirm the fix is working correctly. The claim endpoint now properly returns session_reset data and the frontend correctly resets the session timer to 24 hours after collecting rewards.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: /api/mining/claim/{uid} endpoint now returns session_reset data (lines 4231-4236)
Fix verified: Cache invalidation added after claim (lines 4227-4229)
Frontend Mining.js correctly uses response.data.session_reset to immediately update UI state (lines 182-191)
The 80/20 luxury savings split is working correctly - user receives 80% of mined PRC
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user with active mining session
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mining claim flow is fully functional. The fix addresses the original bug where clicking 'Collect Rewards' showed success but session didn't reset properly. Now the session timer resets to 24 hours and session earnings reset to 0 after collection.

Mining page loads after login.details: Page loads at /daily-rewards with all elements visible

Session earnings accumulate.details: PRC accumulates over time (5.1967 PRC observed)

Success toast after collect.details: Toast shows '🎉 Collected 4.21 PRC! (₹1.05 saved for Luxury Life)'

Session PRC resets to 0.details: Session earnings reset from 5.1967 to 0.1517 PRC

Mining continues after collection.details: Session stays active, PRC continues accumulating

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Clicking 'Collect Rewards' shows success but session doesn't reset properly
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: 1) Missing 'return response' in claim endpoint, 2) No session reset data in response
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Added return statement, 2) Added session_reset, new_session_start, new_session_end, remaining_hours to response, 3) Added cache invalidation
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Session timer now properly resets to 24 hours after collection
